clusters.justification: These terms share convergent co-activation within the amygdala, anterior insula, and anterior cingulate cortices, representing the high-level macroscopic domain of emotional processing and physiological arousal.
This cluster reflects the broad computations of subjective utility, reinforcement, and goal-directed behavior mapped robustly onto corticostriatal and ventromedial prefrontal pathways.

These concepts drive highly reliable co-activation within the medial prefrontal, precuneal, and temporoparietal cortical hubs, binding self-referential internal mentation with social-inferential processing.
